title: pgstat — Replication & WAL
description: Replikasyon lag (bytes/seconds), replication slots durumu, WAL uretimi, archiver lag.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes'
select coalesce(max(replay_lag_bytes), 0) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes'

select count(*) filter (where active) as value from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance)
select coalesce(sum(period_wal_size_byte), 0) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour'

select $__timeGroupAlias(snapshot_ts, $__interval), coalesce(application_name, client_addr::text, 'standby') as metric, max(replay_lag_bytes) as value from fact.pg_replication_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(snapshot_ts) group by 1, coalesce(application_name, client_addr::text, 'standby') order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), sum(period_wal_size_byte)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from $__interval::interval), 0) as "WAL B/s" from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select slot_name, slot_type, plugin, active, wal_status, slot_lag_bytes as lag_bytes, safe_wal_size, total_bytes, spill_bytes from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_replication_slot_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance) order by slot_lag_bytes desc nulls last

select sample_ts, archived_count, last_archived_wal, last_archived_time, failed_count, last_failed_wal, last_failed_time from fact.pg_archiver_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_archiver_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance) limit 1
